description: Composition Red V-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest print Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Gift your bubbly little girl a pretty and comfortable t-shirt that enhances your cuteness in style. The short sleeves and chest print add an element of sweetness, while the cotton fabric keeps her fresh and comfortable all day. Pair this top with a denim shorts and sandals to complete her playmate look.
